pi_items.source: Verified via manual inspection of the real sample dive data file SampleDivesV2.ssrf from the official Subsurface repo, matching the second dive on 2010-12-04.
Verified via parsing the 'date' attribute of Dive #3 in SampleDivesV2.ssrf.
Verified against the explicit requirements in the task description 'nitrox gas mix of 32% oxygen'.
Verified against the explicit requirements in the task description 'Set the cylinder size to 12.0 liters'.
Verified against the explicit requirements in the task description 'working pressure to 200 bar'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real dive data from Subsurface's SampleDivesV2.ssrf file. Dive #3 is verified to occur on 2010-12-04, representing the second dive of the day at Sund Rock. The agent must add a nitrox cylinder exactly configured to 32% O2, 12.0 liters, and 200 bar, as explicitly required in the task description (though the program verifier is slightly more lenient, accepting sizes 10-12, pressures 200-210, and O2 30-34).
